rationale: Educ. Code §7.037 governs TEA's maintenance of a school district reporting schedule. It is unrelated to homestead exemption amounts or property tax appraisal values under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: To the extent possible, the Texas Education Agency shall develop and maintain a comprehensive schedule that addresses each reporting requirement generally applicable to a school district
_note: No conflict; rule concerns reporting schedules, not homestead exemption amounts.
